synopsis: Ustaad Bhagat Singh is a 2026 Telugu-language mass action entertainer starring Pawan Kalyan, directed by Harish Shankar and produced by Mythri Movie Makers. Releasing on March 19, 2026, the film is known for its high-voltage action, vintage mass vibes, and power-packed dialogues, reuniting the Gabbar Singh duo
title: USTAAD BHAGAT SINGH

synopsis: Dhurandhar: The Revenge (2026) is a high-octane Hindi spy-action thriller directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh as undercover agent Hamza Ali Mazari. Following the 2025 blockbuster Dhurandhar, this sequel focuses on revenge, featuring Sanjay Dutt, R. Madhavan, and Arjun Rampal. Known for its intense action and nearly 4-hour runtime,
title: DURANDHAR - THE REVENGE

synopsis: Mrithyunjay (2026) is a Telugu-language crime thriller film starring Sree Vishnu and Reba Monica John, directed by Hussain Sha Kiran. It follows a marketing employee who uncovers murders disguised as accidents. The film was released on March 6, 2026, and is noted for its thriller elements, though with mixed reviews
title: mrithyunjay

synopsis: Retro (2025) is a Tamil action-drama directed by Karthik Subbaraj starring Suriya as Paarivel Kannan, a gangster raised in 1960s Thoothukudi who attempts to abandon his violent life for his lover, Rukmini (Pooja Hegde). The plot follows his struggle to reform while facing his past, featuring themes of love, war, and vengeance.
title: Retro

synopsis: Kantara is a Kannada action thriller set in a fictional village in the coastal forests of Karnataka. It explores the conflict between humans and nature, revolving around a demigod tradition and a man who must protect his land and culture.
title: Kantara

synopsis: Gymkhana is a sports-comedy drama about a group of youngsters who fail their exams and decide to join a boxing gym to secure college admission through the sports quota. What follows is a journey of friendship, discipline, rivalry, and self-discovery inside the boxing ring.
title: Gymkhana

synopsis: O' Romeo (2026) is a crime thriller directed by Vishal Bhardwaj. The film is a riveting tale of love, betrayal, and survival set against the backdrop of the Mumbai underworld, weaving Shakespearean themes into a modern gangland saga.
title: O' Romeo

synopsis: Tu Yaa Main (2026) is a survival thriller with a romantic core. Two strangers find themselves stranded in a hostile environment and must rely on each other to survive, discovering love amidst danger and chaos.
title: Tu Yaa Main

synopsis: Assi (2026) is a gripping drama-thriller starring Taapsee Pannu. Set in the lanes of Varanasi, the film explores themes of identity, resilience, and justice as a woman fights against a system stacked against her.
title: Assi

synopsis: Do Deewane Seher Mein (2026) is a romantic drama directed by Ravi Udyawar. Two dreamers in Mumbai cross paths and discover that love isn't about finding the perfect person but about seeing imperfections perfectly.
title: Do Deewane Seher Mein

synopsis: Vadh 2 (2026) is a crime thriller sequel. An ordinary man pushed to extraordinary limits returns in this thrilling chapter, where moral boundaries blur and survival instincts take over in a dangerous cat-and-mouse game.
title: Vadh 2

synopsis: The Kerala Story 2: Goes Beyond (2026) continues the dramatic saga, taking the narrative to an international level. The film delves deeper into the lives of its protagonists as they face new challenges and revelations across borders.
title: The Kerala Story 2
